evidence.headline: I BUILD aligned BRANDS THAT FEEL clear, cohesive, AND READY TO grow.
evidence.subheading: From thoughtful websites to strategic content and brand direction.
keyPhrases: Signs your brand is ready to evolve
Your business is growing but your brand still looks DIY
Relying on content instead of conversion
Soul led & sold out — coming soon
audienceClues: holistic businesses, wellness brands, and creative entrepreneurs
toneExamples: You don't need more noise. You need clarity, direction, and a brand that actually reflects the work you do.
Because when your brand is built properly, you don't have to chase. It speaks for you.
Ready to build a brand that actually feels like you?
colorClues: soft orb graphics repeated across the page
visualClues: orb/circle motif used as a signature element
editorial mixed-case headlines: uppercase with lowercase italic accent words
numbered journey: Discovery, Insight, Transformation, Guidance
evidence.industry: Brand, web design & social media studio

industry.value: Brand strategy, web design & social media studio for small businesses
industry.evidence: Site title: "Affordable Social Media & Website Design Services For Small Businesses"

archetype.description: The Mindful SMM leads with clarity and guidance — a calm expert who brings direction to brands that have outgrown DIY — softened by genuine care for the founder behind the business.
archetype.evidence: Client: "she guided me in various matters... contributed greatly from her knowledge"

items.name: Service-based & wellness brands
items.desc: Holistic businesses, wellness brands and creative entrepreneurs whose work has matured past their branding.

items.name: Growing small businesses
items.desc: Founders whose "business is growing but the brand still looks DIY" — explicitly named on the homepage.

items.name: The misaligned
items.desc: Owners attracting the wrong clients (or none), whose websites don't reflect their value.

audience.evidence: Page text: "service-based and wellness brands" + "signs your brand is ready to evolve" list

tone.description: Calm, direct, and quietly authoritative. Opens by removing pressure ("You don't need more noise") then speaks in clear, short declaratives. Personal without being soft — every line points at clarity, alignment and growth rather than hype.
tone.evidence: Homepage: "You don't need more noise. You need clarity, direction..."

personality.evidence: Word frequency on page: clarity x4, aligned x6, intentional x4; client called the process "calming"

palette.evidence: Site imagery is literally named "Turquoise circles" and "Cream circles" (hexes estimated from imagery, not CSS)

typography.notes: The headline style is already a signature: uppercase serif broken by lowercase italic words ("I BUILD aligned BRANDS"). Carry that exact pattern into social graphics — it is instantly recognisable.
typography.evidence: Homepage headline mixes uppercase and lowercase-italic words: "I BUILD aligned BRANDS THAT FEEL clear..."

visual.evidence: Orb graphics repeat across the page; journey steps named Discovery, Insight, Transformation, Guidance

items: A named enemy and promise in one line: "You don't need more noise" — clarity over content volume
The "signs your brand is ready to evolve" framework is a ready-made, ownable content series
Real client proof in the brand's own register: "calming, and exciting" — the experience matches the message
Seven services that ladder into one offer: a brand that "speaks for you"
strengths.evidence: All four quote the homepage directly

items: Turn each of the four "signs your brand is ready to evolve" into its own carousel — a recurring diagnostic series
Document the Discovery → Guidance journey with one real client per month, in their words like Mihal's
Show before/after of "DIY brand → aligned brand" using your own project work (The Solace etc.)
Tease "Soul led & sold out" with a waitlist content arc — it's already on the homepage
opportunities.evidence: Built from the site's own frameworks, journey steps, project links and coming-soon banner

items.title: Signs you're ready to evolve
items.desc: The homepage diagnostic, expanded one sign at a time.

items.title: The journey
items.desc: Discovery, Insight, Transformation, Guidance — shown through real client work.

items.title: Clarity over noise
items.desc: Perspective pieces on building brands that speak for themselves.

items.title: Behind the build
items.desc: Websites, brand shoots and creative direction in progress.

themes.evidence: Themes are the site's own frameworks: "signs your brand is ready to evolve" + the four-step journey

positioning.value: For service-based and wellness brands that have outgrown DIY, The Mindful SMM builds aligned brands — strategy, websites and content — that speak for you, so you don't have to chase.
positioning.evidence: Homepage: "when your brand is built properly, you don't have to chase. It speaks for you."

creative.value: Own the orb: make the floating turquoise-on-cream circle the recurring mark across every post. Set headlines in the site's signature uppercase-serif-with-italic-accents pattern, keep layouts airy, and let client words carry the proof — testimonials art-directed like editorial pull quotes.
creative.evidence: Derived from the repeated orb graphics, the mixed-case headline style, and testimonial-led page structure
